title: The World Reacts Before the Reverie
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy, Shirahoshi as News of Whole Cake Island spreads across the world and the story pivots toward the Reverie.
scene: The world learns a distorted version of the Whole Cake Island incident as royal delegations move toward the Reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The Mermaid Princess! (1)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the paladin of the seas, King Neptune!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So this is the world aboveground...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The Mermaid Princess!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Prince Fukaboshi @

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Ryugu kingdom has been a member of the World Government Alliance for over 200 years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Her beauty...:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And yet, this is only the second time it has participated in reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Princess Shirahoo- Shi! O

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sheesh, I thought I was gonna die down on the ocean floor. Blwahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Garp!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This was already quite the event.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WHAT INCREDIBLE BEAUTY!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This goes far beyond the rumors... should we release a special edition, Mr. Editor?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mr. Editor?! Mor- Gans?! crap, he's totally fallen for her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GARP! Shirahoshi's Super Popular!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I mean, rumor has always had it that the beauty mermaid Princess of Fishman Island

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is a match for even the pirate empress, Hancock! People know her!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But she's even more beautiful than the rumors say!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And so big!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: BUWA HAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: M- Mr. Luffy's Grand- Father!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Is that... the famous...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Forest" that I hear you have above- ground?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's just a tree.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Oi! Garp, the hero!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Do you know

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Who I am?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who are you, ya little shit?! get out of my way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Little shit?! did I mishear you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: How rude!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course you did, Stelly! You must have!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am Stelly, King of your Homeland, The GoA Kingdom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Which means you, as my citizen

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are effectively my subordi- Nate! Do not forget it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The King of the GoA Kingdom!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For a peaceful backwater country, it's produced a frightening number of criminals!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DRAGON, SABO, FIRE FIST, STRAM HAT... GARP'S THE EXCEPTION. HOW VERY INTERESTING...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Tidbits about Stelly

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The GoA kingdom is the place that Luffy, Ace, and SABO spent their young years.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sabo was once part of the nobility, and stelly is his adopted brother.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With Hawk-eyed determination, Stelly Gunned for a path to the Royalty. He married grin-Less Nantokanette, and, after the mysterious deaths of the former King and Prince a few months ago, took the throne.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Get lost.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yer ugly mug's bothering' me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So rude I don't even know what to say!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Look, here's the deal, GARP.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Set me up with the nobility! I'm aiming to be a celestial dragon one day!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: to a shitstain like you? Fat chance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What a AAA?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you kidding me?! Did no one hear that insult just now?! That should be the death penalty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ah! I messed up.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Forget I said that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Is this guy for real?!

summary: This section advances the Reverie Setup storyline with 53 dialogue beats. The aftermath becomes world news and the narrative shifts toward the Reverie and global politics.
